query: Show me items below reorder point at MAIN-WEST
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-inventory with maximo-overview as parent
Resolves 'MAIN-WEST' through the workspace glossary to a SITEID or storeroom location set
Uses v_inventory_position (or v_reorder_alerts) — does NOT join INVENTORY to all LOCATIONS without filtering TYPE='STOREROOM'
Computes AVAILABLE = CURBAL - RESERVEDQTY (does not report CURBAL as 'available')
